title: More Coins!
description: This mod adds craftable and vanilla-ish coins and cash to the game, along with a new gem "Alloyed Diamond", which can be crafted into a very strong armor and tools. It also adds Butter.
body:
Needs FABRIC API!

Runs on FABRIC ONLY! Forge port coming soon. Mod will not be updated to previous versions, such as 1.12.2.

WHAT does this mod do?

> This mod adds craftable and vanilla-ish coins and cash to the game, along with a new gem "Alloyed Diamond", which can be crafted into a very strong armor and tools. It also adds Butter and Butter Armor, because the logo is literally butter. It also adds copper nuggets, used to craft many things. It also adds a TON of need for gold, as nearly everything needs gold here.

Does this add any ores?

> The mod directly doesn't add ores. It adds a gem called the "Alloyed Diamond", an extremely powerful, but expensive alloy.

Crafting

Copper Cents:

8 copper nuggets surrounding copper ingot. Shapeless.

Copper Nuggets:

1 Copper ingot makes 9 nuggets, and reverse.

Gold Coin:

4 Gold nuggets at the corners, a gold block in the centre and 4 Raw gold surrounding it.

Iron Coin:

4 Iron Nuggets in the corner. An iron block in the centre and 4 iron ingots surrounding it.

Diamond Coin:

A diamond block in the centre. Four diamonds surrounding it. 1 Gold coin in a corner and rest are filled with amethyst shards.

Netherite Coin:

A netherite block in the centre. Four Diamond Coins surrounding it. 4 Gold Coins in the corners.

Emerald Cash:

4 Gold coins in the corners. Green dye in the top middle and bottom middle. Emerald in centre, with two papers beside it.

Redstone Cash:

Redstone block in the centre. Four papers surrounding it. 2 gold coins in the corner and 2 red dyes in the corner.

Gold Cash:

Gold Block in the centre. Three gold coins on top. One gold coin directly below the block. 2 Yellow dye in each side of the gold coin. Papers fill in the sides of the gold block.

Alloyed Diamond

Diamond in the middle. Four gold coins in corner. 4 iron ingots covering it.

Diamond Cash:

Four gold coins in the corners. Diamond in centre. Two papers beside it. LightBlueDye below and above it.

Butter:

Smoke milk to get one brick of butter.

Butter Armor:

Same as any armor, just with butter.

Alloyed Armor:

Same as any armor but with alloyed diamonds.
